bestFriends.relationship: Creates the right strategy based on conditions. Instead of the client doing if-else to pick a strategy, the Factory encapsulates that logic.
Notifies listeners when strategy changes. Useful for logging, analytics, or UI updates when the algorithm switches.
bestFriends.example: When payment strategy changes, notify the analytics service

bestFriends.relationship: Wraps a strategy with extra behavior (logging, timing, caching) without modifying the strategy itself.
bestFriends.example: SurgeFare wraps any FareStrategy with a multiplier

evilTwin.similarity: Identical class structure -- Context holds interface, concrete classes implement it.
evilTwin.difference: In Strategy, the CLIENT chooses which algorithm to use. In State, the OBJECT ITSELF changes its behavior based on internal state transitions.
evilTwin.mnemonic: Strategy = YOU choose. State = IT changes itself.
evilTwin.note: Full comparison will be added after learning the State pattern.

evolution.direction: Strategy evolves into Template Method when algorithms share a common skeleton but differ in specific steps.
evolution.when: If 80% of your strategies share the same code, extract the skeleton into a base class.
